title: スプリンターズSにむけて

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...Um, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You seem on edge about something, what's the
matter?
choice_data_list: I just want you to win...

text_block_list.text:
Every sprinter dreams at least once about
competing with the best of the best. This is one
race I definitely want to see her win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I will win. I am the class representative after all.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
However, I do believe there is a need for some
course correction!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I believe I may have strayed from the Bakushin
Road, the path I had from the very start...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
So I will set a record at the Sprinters Stakes with
my sonic speed!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With all that being said, let us aim for the Tenno
Sho and Arima Kinen, just like we planned!

It looks like she wants to make this race her last
sprint...

But I want her to keep sprinting, especially when I
think about how she'll be even faster next year.
I'm trying to come up with some way to convince
her, when...
Knock, knock.
Excuse me, but could you spare a moment?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Of course, come on in! I'm always ready for a visit!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hello, Bakushin O.

Nishino Flower. She made her debut as a sprinter
at the same time as Sakura Bakushin O. She's got
the skills, and her name is quickly making the
rounds.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Well if it isn't Nishino Flower! I welcome you to
the class representative's abode!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Are you in need of advice? I most definitely will
lend an ear, so let's talk!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh no, I just dropped by to say hello...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Is it about today's race? If so, feel free to ask me
anything!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As class representative, I will not hold back in
giving advice to my rival and runner-in-arms!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh... um, I am glad to see you're in good spirits!

This girl runs at a remarkable speed, despite what
her gentle demeanor suggests. She is sure to be
today's fiercest competition.

Racing against Nishino Flower will definitely be a
challenge for Sakura Bakushin O. I'm excited to
see what will happen!
choice_data_list:
I hope to see the both of you giving it your best
today.

I hope to see the both of you giving it your best
today.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I will! I look forward to racing with you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us depart! The Bakushin Road awaits!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: The Bakushin Road? What's that?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It is the path a class representative must tread!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Is... is that so?
...I can't wait!
